messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A stuck role's escalation never emails the human on a headless box — the alert has no headless sender
What it solves: THE DEFECT. When a role sits stuck/gated past grace+cooldown, the live `handoffd.bb`'s
`:on-stuck-escalation!` adapter (handoffd.bb:629) is wired to EXACTLY ONE action:
`chase-sweep-lib/write-escalation!`, which writes `.swarmforge/daemon/chase-escalations.json`
and stops. The code that EMAILS the …
How it works: A newly escalated role emails the human
